meaning: adj.鐘瑰お浜虹殑,鐘瑰お鏃忕殑
examples: The Jewish feast of Passover began last night.
Their children attend a Jewish parochial school.
The Warners were from a Jewish working-class background.
For better and sometimes worse, these have been primary bulwarks of Jewish success in America.
The open conditions of the frontier were ideal for Jewish merchants, like the Goldwaters of Phoenix.
